The Chicago, Milwaukee & St.
Paul railway is accommodating a
large amount of steel at Lind on
the line of the North Pacific rail
way, preparatory to the commence
ment of construction work. II is
the announced intention Of the Mil
waukee to make its principal d.
vision point east of the Sound at
Othello, Wash, which lies few
miles northwest of Lind and 70
miles from Spokane. Track will
be laid to Othelio connecting that
place with the main line of the
Northern Pacific, which will serve
as means of securing necessary
supplies and building material.
Work will soon be in full swing on
the new road In this state.


Considerable speculation is be-
ing INDUCED In as to where the
Milwaukee will make It's division
headquarters In Northern Idaho. 1t
is stated that the intention of the
company is to go over the Bitter
Root range of mountains by using
